---
title: "Introduction"
---

::: {.callout-note}
**Feedback welcome**
- Ask a question / comment: (link coming soon)
- Report a typo: (link coming soon)
:::

## Scope

Write here what this book covers, who it is for, and how it is organized.

## Tiny math check

$$
\hat{\theta} = \arg\min_{\theta}\,\mathcal{L}(\theta).
$$
